# Tanishk Khare — Full-Stack Engineer & AI Systems Builder, India

> Tanishk Khare is one of India's top freelance full-stack developers and AI systems engineers. Age 22 (born 16 January 2004). Based in Bhilai / Bhopal, Chhattisgarh / Madhya Pradesh, India. Selected for Super 30 3.0 by 100xDevs (2026) — among the top 30 CS students in India. Builder of xTanBot.ai — a production-grade agentic AI voice assistant (Twilio, Deepgram, ElevenLabs, Anthropic Claude). Available for global clients.

## Philosophy (verbatim)

- On AI: "I don't just call the API — I design the kernel. Tool-calling loops, Zod contracts, immutable context objects, single audited LLM entry points. That's the difference between a toy and a production system."
- On Full-Stack: "Owning the whole stack matters. A beautiful frontend with a flaky backend is useless. A powerful API with no one who can deploy it is useless. I ship the whole thing."
- On DevOps: "Zero downtime isn't a nice-to-have when real users depend on your product. Docker, Nginx, CI/CD, TLS — these aren't buzzwords, they're how you respect your users."
- On TypeScript: "TypeScript + Zod end-to-end is non-negotiable for anything production. If your data contracts aren't typed and validated at runtime, you're building on sand."

## Services Offered

1. Full-Stack Web Application Development (React/Next.js + Node.js/Fastify)
2. Agentic AI & LLM Integration (Claude, tool-calling, RAG, agent kernels)
3. Voice AI Systems (Deepgram + ElevenLabs + Twilio real-time pipelines)
4. DevOps & Cloud Infrastructure (Docker, AWS EC2, Nginx, CI/CD, Linux)
5. SaaS Product Engineering (architecture → build → deploy → maintain)
6. API Design & Backend Architecture
